description: Apply temperature scaling to class probabilities selected only by inner-validation NLL.
hard_guardrail: No outer-test probability table may be used for selecting temperature.

description: Blend predicted class probabilities toward the inner-training class prior.
hard_guardrail: Prior must be computed from inner-training labels only.

description: Sharpen or smooth regime posterior weights before blending regime-specific alpha models.
hard_guardrail: Regime posterior temperature must be selected before outer-test prediction.

description: Shrink regime-conditioned probabilities toward the global model when inner validation favors the safer pooled expert.
hard_guardrail: Shrinkage weight must be selected inside each outer fold.

description: Pre-specified score threshold grid to reduce weak low-confidence trades; registered for a later execution-focused run.
hard_guardrail: Threshold selection must not use Phase 40 Sharpe or outer-test returns.
